enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a morning life update from Boulder, sharing that he just woke up after an irregular sleep schedule. He discusses finishing work on uploading the book 'Plenty' (Pliny the Elder) to his website's education section, compares his presentation to another version on Perseus/Tufts, and responds to a critical comment calling him lazy for smoking weed.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: believes his format is better than the version on Perseus.tufts.edu
defends it as helpful and mind-opening; rejects criticism that it makes him a bad influence
claims he is moving at a 'blisteringly fast pace' and making real progress
